texto: My normal friends loved having a token author. Just like every WoW raiding party needs at least one healer, every gaggle needs at least one artist. They enjoyed introducing me to people at bars. "This is Jessica. She's a writer." That's really code for "She's definitely fucking someone tonight. Hang around long enough, and that someone might be you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jessica Wildfire: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “My normal friends loved having a token author. Just like every WoW raiding party needs at least o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, artist, writer pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
